title: Send
subtitle: Send assets to another address. Double-check the recipient — blockchain transfers cannot be reversed.

recipient.label: Recipient address
recipient.helper: Paste an XRPL address starting with r…
recipient.helperEvm: Paste a 0x… address on this network.

error.checksum: Address checksum (EIP-55) is wrong. Re-check the case of the letters.
error.selfSend: This is your own address. Make sure that's what you want.

flagsUnverified.title: Could not verify recipient settings
flagsUnverified.body: We couldn't reach the XRPL network to check if a destination tag is required. If this is an exchange or custodial account, confirm the requirement manually before sending.

error.zero: Amount must be greater than zero

memo.label: Destination tag (memo)
memo.helper: A numeric tag used by exchanges and custodial services to identify your transfer.

error.requiredByRecipient: This recipient requires a destination tag

gas.helper: Leave fields empty to use the network estimate. Values in gwei.

destinationTag.label: Destination tag
destinationTag.helper: A numeric tag used by exchanges and custodial services to identify your transfer.

error.requiredByRecipient: This recipient requires a destination tag

memoText.label: Memo
memoText.helper: Optional free-form note attached to the transaction (up to 100 bytes).

error.tooLong: Memo must be 100 bytes or less

notActivated.title: Your wallet is not activated
notActivated.body: Receive at least 1 XRP to activate your wallet before you can send.

ledgerEvm.title: Ledger supports only XRP in this release
ledgerEvm.body: Switch to a multi-chain account to send EVM assets, or update the supported app in a future release.

firstTime.title: First time sending to this address
firstTime.body: Always verify the address with the recipient. Blockchain transfers cannot be reversed.

preview.disclaimer: You're about to sign and broadcast a payment to {{address}}.
preview.disclaimerEvm: You're about to sign and broadcast an EVM transaction to {{address}}.

sign.title: Signing on this device…
sign.body: Your key stays local. We sign the transaction and broadcast it to the network.

failure.title: Send failed
failure.body: We couldn't broadcast the transaction. Please try again.
